Scope of Works

Every finish, from rough to ready

Skimming & Re-skims

Full rooms or single walls skimmed back to a flawless, paint-ready surface.

Artex Removal

Dated textured ceilings made smooth and modern — safely handled, properly sealed.

Rendering

External render, conservatories and patch repairs that stand up to Devon weather.

Repairs & Patching

Cracks, blown plaster and water damage blended invisibly into the wall.

Boarding & Dot-and-Dab

Lath strip-outs, overboarding and ceilings boarded ready for a perfect skim.

New Builds & Renovations

Full-property plastering for new builds, extensions and complete renovations.

From single rooms to whole homes.

Inside and out — skim finishes, full renders and everything between.

From single rooms to whole new builds — back to brick, boarded, skimmed and finished.

One house, start to finish — keep scrolling
STAGE 1

The tired old render

Decades-old, cracked and blown — letting damp in and dragging the whole house down.

STAGE 2

Stripped back to brick

Every inch of failed render off, brickwork checked and prepped properly — no shortcuts.

STAGE 3

Scratch coat on

Base coats built up flat and true, ready for the finish that has to survive Devon weather.

STAGE 4

Finished & weatherproof

Topcoat on, painted, scaffold down. A different house — protected for decades.

All-inLabour & materials

Ceilings, curves & awkward corners.
